price: Wenn sie sich dir widersetzen, dann sag: „Ich sage mich los von dem, was ihr tut.
arabic: فَإِنۡ عَصَوۡكَ فَقُلۡ إِنِّي بَرِيٓءٞ مِّمَّا تَعۡمَلُونَ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: fa-in ʿaṣawka faqul innī barīon mimmā taʿmalūna
